title: Tatabánya、Komárom-Esztergom — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Tatabánya、Komárom-Esztergomの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TatabányaはKomárom-Esztergomにある人口65,845の都市です。A modern industrial city in northwestern Hungary, known for its mining heritage, the Turul Monument, and the nearby Gerecse Mountains.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
